aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic level of AEO readiness with some foundational elements in place, such as schema markup and contact information. However, there are significant gaps in online presence and customer engagement.
quick_wins: Encourage customers to leave Google reviews to build credibility and improve local search visibility.
Optimize website content with targeted keywords related to HVAC services in New York City.
Implement a blog section to regularly publish relevant content and improve SEO.

gbp_analysis.found: The website includes basic business information and contact details, but lacks detailed service descriptions and location-specific content.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has some Google Business Profile (GBP) elements present, but it is not fully optimized for local search. The absence of Google reviews is a significant drawback.
critical_issues: No Google reviews, which impacts local search ranking and customer trust.
Inconsistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) information across the website and potential external citations.
Lack of detailed service and location-specific content.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP information on its website, but it is unclear if this information is consistently cited across other online platforms and directories.
action_items: Audit and ensure consistent NAP information across all online platforms, including social media, directories, and industry-specific sites.
Claim and verify the business on Google My Business and other major directories.
Regularly update and monitor NAP information to maintain accuracy.

schema_gaps: No Organization schema for better search engine understanding of the business.
Missing LocalBusiness schema with detailed address and service area information.
No Review schema to highlight customer testimonials and ratings.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer engagement and online reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Customers searching for HVAC services in New York City who rely on reviews and detailed service information.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and optimizing website content with local keywords.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establishing the business as a local authority by publishing expert articles and engaging with the community through social media and local events.
